Commands for working with CircleCI jobs.

Jobs are the individual units of work within a workflow. Each job
runs in a separate executor (docker, machine, etc.) and produces
artifacts and test results.

Usage:
  job [command]

Available Commands:
  artifacts   List artifacts for a job
  cancel      Cancel a running job
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  get         Get details for a job
  help        Help about any command
  list        List jobs for a workflow

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for job

Use "job [command] --help" for more information about a command.
